description.value:
Prerequisite: Advanced Bloodline (Keirigan), Keirigan +2, Deadly Insight +2, Executioner's Mark.

Benefit: You can spend a meta-chakra charge to empower an attack made with the Executioner's Mark bonus. If the attack is a melee or ranged attack, its critical threat range increases by your Deadly Insight bonus. If the attack is a spell, ability or technique, its Save DC increases by your Deadly Insight bonus, but only for the studied target. Attacks made targeting an object or structure deal 50% extra damage. This feat can be used twice per day. Critical threat range and Save DC increases do not stack with similar bonuses provided by other sources.
